# terminal_card (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "terminal_card" "example_card" {
  id = "crd_XXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXX"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) ID of the card to get.

### Read-Only

- `data` (Attributes) Credit card used for payments in the Terminal shop. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--data))

<a id="nestedatt--data"></a>
### Nested Schema for `data`

Read-Only:

- `brand` (String) Brand of the card.
- `created` (String) Date the card was created.
- `expiration` (Attributes) Expiration of the card. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--data--expiration))
- `id` (String) Unique object identifier.
The format and length of IDs may change over time.
- `last4` (String) Last four digits of the card.

<a id="nestedatt--data--expiration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `data.expiration`

Read-Only:

- `month` (Number) Expiration month of the card.
- `year` (Number) Expiration year of the card.
